title: Verify Trial Corner is assigned to user who does not start consumption within 5 minutes
description: Test that a new trial user who signs up and does not watch any content for over 5 minutes is correctly assigned to the Trial Corner cohort.
preconditions: User has just activated a ₹1 trial
User has not played any content

steps.description: 1. Activate a new trial for a user.
2. Wait for 6 minutes without playing any video content.

expected_result: The Trial Corner homepage widget is visible to the user.
